evals.prompt: I just redesigned the SettingsView and need to update the snapshot tests. The old snapshots are failing because the UI changed. Can you re-record them?
evals.expected_output: Agent should find the settings snapshot test, set isRecording = true, run the tests to re-record, set isRecording = false, and verify they pass
expectations: The agent finds and reads the existing SettingsView snapshot test file
The agent sets isRecording = true before running the snapshot test
The agent runs the specific snapshot test with xcodebuild test -only-testing
The agent sets isRecording = false after recording
The agent re-runs the test to verify the new snapshots pass

evals.prompt: I want to add snapshot tests for the new FocusModeView I just built. It has two states — active (with a timer ring) and inactive (with a start button). Can you create the snapshot tests?
evals.expected_output: Agent should create a new snapshot test class following the project's SnapshotTestCase pattern, using SnapshotFixtures for deterministic data, testing both states in light and dark mode
expectations: The agent reads existing snapshot tests (like TodayViewSnapshotTests) to understand the pattern
The agent creates a new test class extending SnapshotTestCase
The agent uses SnapshotFixtures or creates deterministic test data
The agent tests both active and inactive states
The agent includes both light and dark mode snapshots (assertLightAndDarkSnapshot)
The agent runs xcodegen generate after creating the new test file
